title: RTX ON GUNS, DUNGEONS AND TAVERNS
description: RTX ON, now with many guns, dungeons and taverns to explore
body: The fourth sequel to the RTX ON franchise is here, and it includes a variety of new mods, it includes an abundance of guns which you can even use in multiplayer so you can start shooting your friends (in game ofc), a variety of guns are included from Revolvers to AWPs to even a Shrink ray! This modpack also includes many new dungeons and taverns to explore which feature handsome loot and extravagant views. Most importantly, incredible graphics are added into the game to increase the games immersion and VR support is included in the game as well. So go ahead and download the all new Guns, Dungeons and Taverns modpack.
